title: onosma erecta subsp. erecta
intro: Onosma erecta subsp. erecta, also known as Goldenseal, is a plant species belonging to the borage family (Boraginaceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and skin conditions due to its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Goldenseal include its ability to reduce inflammation, fight off infections, and exhibit antioxidant properties, making it a popular herbal remedy for various health concerns. Goldenseal is often prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat conditions such as eczema, acne, and digestive issues.
